description: 跨境私域运营序列 — Email/SMS/WhatsApp 多渠道参考

examples.subject: Welcome to HOMELODY — here's 10% off 👋
examples.body_excerpt:
Hi [First Name],

Smart move — you just joined 120,000+ home-organization obsessed people.

As promised: **10% off your first order** with code WELCOME10 (expires in 48h).

While you browse, here's what our customers love most:
✅ Stackable Storage Bins (6-pack) — $32.99
✅ Kitchen Drawer Organizers — $24.99

[Shop now →]

examples.subject: Hey [Name], your cart's almost gone — 15% off if you finish today 🛒
examples.body_excerpt: Text only. Must include STOP opt-out per TCPA.

examples.subject: [Delivery update] Your order #12345 is out for delivery 📦
examples.body_excerpt:
Hi [Name],

Your HOMELODY order is arriving today between 2-5pm.

Quick tip for our Stackable Bins: stack heaviest at bottom for max stability.

Reply 'HELP' if anything goes wrong.

examples.subject: We miss you. Here's 25% off to come back
examples.body_excerpt:
Hi [First Name],

It's been 90 days since your last order. We took a look and think you'll love what's new:

[New product grid]

Come back with **25% off** — code MISSYOU25. Valid 7 days.

(If you're done with us, hit unsubscribe. We won't chase.)

examples.subject: VIP-only: Early access to Spring collection (24h head start)
examples.body_excerpt:
Hi [Name],

Because you're in our Top 5% customers, you get the new Spring drop 24 hours before everyone else.

[Exclusive collection link]

No code needed — just shop. Your VIP 15% discount is already applied at checkout.

examples.subject: [そろそろ補充のタイミング] お気に入りの商品
examples.body_excerpt:
〇〇様、

ご購入から2ヶ月が経ちました。前回ご購入の保冷ボトル、そろそろ補充のタイミングです。

今なら同商品リピート注文で10%OFF（〜4/30まで）。

compliance_notes.US_EMAIL: CAN-SPAM: 底部含 physical address + unsubscribe link
compliance_notes.US_SMS: TCPA: 显式 opt-in 记录 + STOP 退订 + HELP 帮助
compliance_notes.EU: GDPR: 不能沿用购物 consent，需单独打勾订阅
compliance_notes.SEA: WhatsApp Business Template 需预审批，首发必须 template
